p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD: (1) test_repo_ruff - runs 'ruff check slime_plugins/megatron_bridge/' (auto-installs ruff if missing), (2) test_repo_module_syntax - validates full AST parsing of target file. Docker image builds successfully. Repo uses pytest, ruff, black, isort per pyproject.toml and .pre-commit-config.yaml. CI workflows include pre-commit, pr-test (GPU-heavy e2e tests skipped), and conda-ci. Full test suite requires GPU, torch, and megatron dependencies - not suitable for p2p gates.
